checks.name: schema_completeness
checks.detail: All required payload fields present with comprehensive design_highlights

checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: Multiple flows covering batch processing, error handling, and incremental runs — all properly connected

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: Manual trigger and weekly schedule (Mon 6AM) — valid for on-demand and automatic processing

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: 3 adoption_questions added covering Google Sheet ID, Slack channel, and max URLs per run

checks.name: default_value_coverage
checks.detail: Slack channel (#market-intelligence) and max URLs (200) have defaults. Sheet ID requires user input.

checks.name: prompt_quality
checks.detail: Identity 95w, instructions 900w+ with 5 sections covering URL ingestion through landscape reporting, tool guidance with Google Sheets API endpoints, 3 detailed examples, comprehensive error handling

checks.name: safety_scan
checks.detail: 0 critical findings. Rate limiting (2 req/s) and 200-URL cap prevent abuse.

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 95w, instructions cover 5 major sections totaling 900+ words with detailed classification taxonomy (14 industries, 6 audiences, 9 business models), tool guidance with Sheets API batch operations, 3 examples (standard batch, error handling, incremental), and extensive error handling including JS-rendered sites and login walls.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: http_request for website fetching and Google Sheets API. file_read/file_write for batch state and classification cache. Slack API for reports. All tools match suggested_tools.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Manual trigger for on-demand runs + weekly Monday 6AM schedule for automatic re-processing. Both align with the batch processing workflow.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: Google Sheets (OAuth2) and Slack (bot_token) connectors well-defined with credential fields and setup instructions. google-sheets builtin available.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Batch state persistence for interrupted runs, 30-day classification cache with TTL, and historical landscape report storage. Good but no agent_memory protocol usage.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Covers Google Sheets rate limits and auth, Slack failures, per-website fetch failures (timeout, DNS, SSL, redirects, login walls, JS-rendered), content edge cases (non-English, parked domains, ambiguous industries), and data integrity (duplicate URLs, corrupted state, sheet structure changes).

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: Prompt covers URL ingestion, batch processing with rate limiting, 7-dimension AI classification, Google Sheets enrichment, and landscape summary generation. All described flows are executable.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Crystal clear value: transform a list of URLs into a structured market intelligence database with automated classification and landscape analysis. Replaces hours of manual website review.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: Google Sheets and Slack connectors are straightforward. Website fetching via HTTP is standard. OAuth2 for Google Sheets adds setup complexity. 200-URL cap and rate limiting are sensible.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: 7-dimension AI classification, white space opportunity identification, incremental processing with caching, and landscape trend tracking over time go significantly beyond simple web scraping.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: All 3 adoption questions are needed. Sheet ID is essential, Slack channel customizes delivery, max URLs controls processing scope.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Good defaults for Slack channel and max URLs. Google Sheet ID has no default — must be provided. The template is otherwise ready to adopt once the sheet is configured.

issues: No adoption_questions existed — connectors need user-specific configuration for Google Sheet ID and Slack channel
Google Sheets OAuth2 setup is more complex than API key connectors — may benefit from additional setup guidance in adoption flow
